ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (IF(S_D_Parameter_1__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0) + IF(S_D_Parameter_2__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0) + IF(S_D_Parameter_3__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0) + IF(S_D_Parameter_4__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0) + IF(S_D_Parameter_5__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0) + IF(S_D_Parameter_6__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0) + IF(S_D_Parameter_7__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0) + IF(S_D_Parameter_8__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0) + IF(S_D_Parameter_9__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0) + IF(S_D_Parameter_10__r.Is_Mandatory__c, 1, 0)) > 1
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A PBIS Target can have only one Mandatory S&D Parameter. Please ensure only one Parameter has 'Is Mandatory' set to true.
